negative.stdout:
% Refutation found. Thanks to Tanya!
% SZS status Theorem for neg_olympic.tptp
% SZS output start Proof for neg_olympic.tptp
2. location(last_summer_olympic_games,tokyo) [input(axiom)]
5. location(last_summer_olympic_games,tokyo) [input(conjecture)]
6. ~location(last_summer_olympic_games,tokyo) [negated conjecture 5]
7. ~location(last_summer_olympic_games,tokyo) [flattening 6]
10. location(last_summer_olympic_games,tokyo) [cnf transformation 2]
17. ~location(last_summer_olympic_games,tokyo) [cnf transformation 7]
18. $false [forward subsumption resolution 10,17]
% SZS output end Proof for neg_olympic.tptp
